hero.subtitle: Receive, send, store, exchange, and pay with tokens from any chains, anywhere in the world. Instant conversion, non-KYC.

virtualCard.title: Virtual NOVA Card
virtualCard.subtitle: Connect any Web3 wallet:
virtualCard.subtitle1: Issue a virtual card, link it to Apple Pay or Google Pay, and pay worldwide without limits.

choose.title: Why Choose Nova Card
choose.subtitle: At Nova Card, we prioritize innovation, security, and anonymous payments, while keeping everything user-friendly. That’s why we are the trusted choice for your financial needs.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.subtitle: We constantly develop new technologies to simplify and improve your financial management experience.

security.title: Security
security.subtitle: Our state-of-the-art encryption and error detection systems ensure your funds are always protected.

comfort.title: Convenience
comfort.subtitle: Apple Pay & Google Pay support. Just connect and start paying.

integration.title: Web3 Wallet Integration
integration.subtitle: Connect your Web3 wallet and integrate it with Nova Card. Issue your card and pay seamlessly.

convertation.title: Conversion
convertation.subtitle: Instant conversion of any token from any network without withdrawing funds from your wallet.

cashback.title: Cashback & Bonus System
cashback.subtitle: Cashback in $NOVA tokens, plus a flexible referral bonus system in project tokens.

global.title: Global Availability
global.subtitle: Accepted in 150+ countries. Connect and pay worldwide.

nobank.title: No Banks or Intermediaries
nobank.subtitle: Non-KYC system, no banks, no middlemen. Full control over your funds.

roadmap.title: Roadmap
roadmap.subtitle: At Nova Card, we’re building more than just a product — we’re creating an ecosystem that keeps evolving. Our roadmap includes regular updates, improvements, and major announcements aimed at making your financial operations safer, more convenient, and faster. We listen carefully to user needs and plan steps ahead to stay at the forefront of fintech innovation.

faq.title: Часто задаваемые вопросы
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know.
faq.a1: Wallet integration is done by connecting it to the Nova Card service website. Immediately after connecting, the service will automatically calculate the balance, and once the virtual card is issued, you can make purchases worldwide without limits with instant conversion.
faq.q2: In which countries does the card work?
faq.a2: Available in over 150 countries — connect and pay for purchases worldwide.
faq.a3: We value the anonymity and security of our clients, which is why our service follows the non-KYC approach — so that every user can enjoy the maximum experience of using Nova Card.
faq.q4: What are the fees when paying?
faq.a4: The Nova Card service has adopted a zero-commission policy, meaning no fees are charged to users for using the service, making payments, or transfers.
faq.a5: According to the roadmap, in Q2 2026 a detailed article with a guide to Nova Card’s bonus system and cashback will be published.
